message:
fix(bubbles): dynamically compute list pagination based on visible chrome

Replace hardcoded 4-line chrome overhead in List pagination with dynamic
calculation that introspects which chrome elements are actually visible
(title, filter bar, spinner, status bar, help).

- Extract chrome_lines_without_pagination() helper that counts visible chrome
- Add update_pagination() method called after every state mutation affecting
  chrome (start/stop spinner, enter filter mode, reset items, apply filters)
- Extract total_pages_from_items() standalone helper
- Conformance tests now fail hard on pagination mismatches instead of logging
  "PARITY NOTE" warnings and silently continuing

This fixes pagination drift when chrome elements are toggled at runtime,
matching Go charmbracelet/bubbles behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
